title: calystegia catesbeiana subsp. sericata
intro: Calystegia catesbeiana subsp. sericata, also known as the beach morning glory, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Convolvulaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve nausea, making it a natural remedy for digestive issues. The health benefits of Calystegia catesbeiana subsp. sericata include its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation, while also serving as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
